title: Prompt Assembly Input (Phase 0 contract lock)
description: The minimal request envelope a caller must provide to invoke prompt assembly. Phase 0 locks shape only; resolution behavior is deferred.

profile_id.description: Profile identifier that selects the assembly recipe (e.g. nf_local_editing_lore_safe_v1).

constraint_surface_refs.description: Stable references to constraint surfaces the assembler must resolve. May be empty for advisory profiles.

caller_metadata.description: Optional non-authoritative metadata about the caller. Never used for trust decisions.
